title: grumilea mindanaensis
intro: Grumilea mindanaensis, also known as the Mindanao grumilea or Mindanao mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the Philippines. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oils, which have been shown to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Grumilea mindanaensis include its potential to reduce fever, relieve headaches and body aches, and aid in digestion. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be consumed or applied topically for medicinal purposes.
